lines.speaker: Parleying Preston
lines.text: Aha! Are you here to parley?

lines.speaker: Parleying Preston
lines.text: I parley everywhere! I haven't encountered a single problem I've not been able to parley my way out of.

lines.speaker: Parleying Preston
lines.text: That's right! Whenever I run into trouble, I just shout parley! To be honest with you, I don't know the first thing about actually being a pirate. All my wealth just comes from parleying all the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. It really feels like that's going to go horribly wrong for you at some point.

lines.speaker: Parleying Preston
lines.text: Nonsense! At the rate I'm going, I'm going to be the greatest pirate ever to have lived! Parley! Parley! Parley!
